svg.title: Map of Ulthos - Made by Abjiklam
svg.desc: A map of Ulthos from "A Song of Ice and Fire". This map covers the following coordinates (parentheses indicate repeating digits): - from 10.0°N to 1.897(72)°S - from 60.0°E to 83.(63) °E

cc:Work.dc:title: Map of Ulthos
cc:Work.dc:description: A map of the Known World from "A Song of Ice and Fire". This map covers the following coordinates (parentheses indicate repeating digits): - from 10.0°N to 1.897(72)°S - from 60.0°E to 83.(63) °E
